description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a steep gable roof and a mix of dark and light exterior cladding. Large windows are arranged vertically along the central axis, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, and a side extension with horizontal siding. The rear of the house showcases a spacious covered deck supported by wooden posts, ideal for outdoor living. The roof is punctuated by skylights and chimneys, adding both functionality and visual interest. The landscaping is minimal, with a grassy yard surrounding the structure.
description: A modern, two-story house with a steep gable roof, large vertical windows, and a covered porch and deck.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with steps, a central vertical window strip, and a side extension with horizontal siding.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the covered deck area supported by wooden posts and the gable end with large windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back entry steps, a large window arrangement, and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the gable end with vertical windows and the minimal landscaping around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and large vertical window above the door
